Razor Token and Utility Method Documentation

This documentation provides details on the various Razor tokens and utility methods available in the DNNrocket framework and associated modules.

Browse the topics below to find the tokens or methods you need.

DNNrocket Core

  • DNNrocketTokens: Core tokens for DNNrocket functionality.
  • DNNrocketUtils: General utility methods for DNNrocket.
  • RazorEngineTokens: Base tokens for the Simplisity Razor Engine.
  • GeneralUtils: General utility methods from the Simplisity framework.
  • UserUtils: Utility methods for user management.

Rocket Modules

  • RocketBlogTokens: Tokens for the RocketBlog API.
  • RocketContentAPITokens: Tokens for the RocketContent API.
  • RocketDirectoryAPITokens: Tokens for the RocketDirectory API.
  • RocketEventsTokens: Tokens for the RocketEvents API.
  • RocketFormsTokens: Tokens for the RocketForms API.
  • RocketNewsAPITokens: Tokens for the RocketNews API.
Edit this page
DNNrocket Project
